𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗫𝗠𝗢𝗫-𝗠𝗔𝗡𝗔𝗚𝗘𝗥 | To provide a user-friendly, scriptable interface for managing Proxmox VE virtual machines and containers directly from the command line.  🌟 Rising Fast!

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 Shell 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a user-friendly, scriptable interface for managing Proxmox VE virtual machines and containers directly from the command line.
📅 Created: Aug 2025 • Updated: Apr 2026

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Single-file Bash script for Proxmox VE management
✅ Interactive TUI for VMs and CTs
✅ Start, stop, restart instances with confirmation
✅ Console access (LXC shell or QEMU terminal)
✅ Snapshot management (list, create, rollback, delete)
✅ SPICE connection details retrieval
✅ Machine-readable JSON and plain-text output
✅ Optional structured logging
✅ Displays node hostname, PVE version, and uptime


◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐ 20 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 2 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Proxmox Manager is a single Bash script that provides an interactive text-based user interface (TUI) for managing Proxmox Virtual Machines (VMs) and Containers (CTs). It simplifies common tasks like starting, stopping, listing, and managing snapshots, offering both interactive and machine-readable output options.

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/TimInTech/proxmox-manager

𝗚𝗥𝗜𝗗𝗟𝗔𝗡𝗗 | Developing cross-platform terminal user interfaces (TUIs) that can be deployed as both standalone command-line applications and web applications.  🔥 Super Hot!

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Developing cross-platform terminal user interfaces (TUIs) that can be deployed as both standalone command-line applications and web applications.
📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: Apr 2026

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

✅ Build terminal apps that run in the browser
✅ React integration for UI development
✅ Built on OpenTUI rendering engine
✅ Quick start with `create-gridland`
✅ Interactive demos
✅ Vite and Next.js integration
✅ UI components via shadcn registry
✅ Sandboxed execution with Docker
✅ Compile to standalone binaries

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Gridland is a TypeScript framework for building terminal applications that can also run seamlessly in web browsers. It leverages the OpenTUI rendering engine and provides React components for creating interactive command-line interfaces.

𝗡𝗢𝗠𝗔𝗜-𝗔𝗣𝗣 | Personalized AI-powered nutrition tracking and meal analysis for healthier eating habits.  🌟 Rising Fast!

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📊 Dart 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Personalized AI-powered nutrition tracking and meal analysis for healthier eating habits.
📅 Created: Feb 2025 • Updated: Apr 2026

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

✅ Meal logging with detailed nutrition breakdowns
✅ AI chat assistant for analysis, planning, and tips
✅ Monthly analytics with charts and summary statistics
✅ Personalization based on dietary preferences, allergies, and targets
✅ Image recognition for faster meal logging
✅ Social sharing capabilities
✅ Modern and responsive user interface

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

NomAI is an open-source Flutter application designed for tracking meals and analyzing nutrition. It leverages AI to provide personalized guidance, making healthy eating more accessible and sustainable through features like quick logging, detailed analytics, and a conversational assistant.

𝗚𝗜𝗧𝗛𝗨𝗕-𝗦𝗧𝗢𝗥𝗘 | To provide a centralized and user-friendly platform for discovering, installing, and managing open-source applications distributed via GitHub releases across multiple operating systems.  🔥 Super Hot!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🤖 Kotlin 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a centralized and user-friendly platform for discovering, installing, and managing open-source applications distributed via GitHub releases across multiple operating systems.
📅 Created: Nov 2025 • Updated: Apr 2026

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Browse and discover open-source apps from GitHub releases
✅ One-click installation of apps
✅ Automatic detection of installable binaries (APK, EXE, DMG, AppImage, DEB, RPM)
✅ Update tracking for installed applications
✅ Clean, app-store-style interface
✅ Built with Kotlin Multiplatform and Compose Multiplatform
✅ Supports Android and Desktop (Linux, macOS, Windows)


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 10.8K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 383 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 26 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

GitHub Store is a cross-platform application store that allows users to discover and install open-source software directly from GitHub releases. It supports automatic detection of various executable formats and provides a streamlined one-click installation process with update tracking.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/OpenHub-Store/GitHub-Store

𝗕𝗟𝗢𝗢𝗠𝗘𝗘𝗧𝗨𝗡𝗘𝗦 | To provide a unified, ad-free music listening experience by combining local music playback with streaming from various online sources through a plugin system.  🔥 Super Hot!

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📊 Dart 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a unified, ad-free music listening experience by combining local music playback with streaming from various online sources through a plugin system.
📅 Created: Dec 2023 • Updated: Apr 2026

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Ad-Free Experience
✅ Plugins system for music sources
✅ Local Music playback
✅ Karaoke-Style Lyrics
✅ Audio Equalizer
✅ Smart Replace for streams
✅ Last.fm Scrobbling
✅ Discord Rich Presence
✅ Global Charts
✅ Cross-Platform (Windows, Linux, Android)
✅ Backup & Restore
✅ AI-Based Recommendations
✅ Multi-Language Support


┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.9K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 178 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 125 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

BloomeeTunes is a cross-platform, ad-free music player built with Flutter and Rust. It allows users to seamlessly stream music from various online sources via a plugin system while also playing local music files. The app offers features like lyrics, an equalizer, and Last.fm scrobbling.

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅
